title: Psitadditions resource pack
description: A resource pack that can be used with all Psitaphile's Datapacks for custom items and 3D models
body:
# **Psitadditions Resource pack**


Use this resource pack for a better experience with all the datapacks offered by Psitaphile.
It adds all the custom textures and 3D models.

## Supported Datapacks:

### **Experience Plus**
[Experience Plus Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/xp-plus)

**Additions:**
- Experience Crystal model
- Experience Crystal Filler model
- Experience Crystal Drainer model
- Experience Player Pad model
- Custom advancement icons
